name: Sour Cream--Chile Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Chopped Roasted Green Chile (preferably New Mexican or Poblano, fresh or frozen)
1 Cup Grated Monterey Jack Cheese (4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a baking dish.
3. In a bowl, stir together the rice, sour cream, chile, coriander, and salt.
4. Spoon half of the mixture into the baking dish and top with half of the cheese.
5. Spoon the remaining rice over the cheese and bake, covered, for 20 minutes.
6. Uncover the dish and top with the remaining cheese and a liberal dusting of paprika.
7. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes, until the cheese melts.
8. Serve the rice hot.
